description: Brand identity brief generated after direction selection
voice: Developer-native. Terse and technical when needed, friendly when explaining. No marketing fluff. Show, don't tell — examples over promises.
audience: Developers and engineering leads at SaaS companies (10-200 employees) who ship frequently and want their users to know what changed without writing release notes by hand.
positioning: The changelog tool that understands your code. Not another template — actual AI comprehension of what changed and why it matters to users.

visualIdentity.typography: Monospace for code contexts (JetBrains Mono), sans-serif for UI (Geist)
